Noting the Law onthe establishment ofthe Extraordinary Chambers dated 27 October 2004
Noting Rule 22 ofthe Internal Rules ofthe Extraordinary Chambers
Noting thejudicial investigation initiated against
LastName KHIEU First Name Samphan Alias Hem
Sex male
Born on 27 July 1931 at Commune ofRom Chek District ofRom Duol Province ofSvay Rieng
Cambodia
Nationality Cambodian
Noting the designation by the Defense Support Section on request ofthe above mentioned person of
Dr SAY Bory as his lawyer dated January 08 2007
1 We accredite and recognise Dr SAY Bory as the lawyer ofthe above mentionedperson for a
provisional period until 31 January 2008
2 This lawyer is authorised to assist his client to freely communicated with him and to participate in
any investigative action
Dated the 09th day ofJanuary 2008 in Phnom Penh
